scripts.build: pnpm --filter @tricity/core build && pnpm --filter @tricity/pipeline build && pnpm --filter @tricity/web build
scripts.test: pnpm --filter @tricity/core build && pnpm --filter @tricity/pipeline build && pnpm --filter @tricity/core test && pnpm --filter @tricity/pipeline test && pnpm --filter @tricity/web test
